resources.string: We\'ll send a 4 digit code to your phone no.

By continuing, I confirm that:
• I and all family members covered under this policy are currently in good physical and mental health.
• None of us has any serious, chronic, or long-term illness (such as cancer, HIV/AIDS, heart disease, diabetes, kidney/liver disease, neurological or lung disorders, autoimmune diseases, congenital conditions, etc.).
• None of us is currently receiving medical treatment, has been advised to undergo treatment or surgery, or has a condition that needs ongoing or future medical care.
• There are no physical disabilities or mental health conditions affecting any insured member.
• I understand that pre-existing conditions are not covered, even if they were not diagnosed before buying this policy.
• I accept that if a pre-existing condition is found later, related insurance claims may be rejected.
• I confirm that all information I’ve provided is true and accurate to the best of my knowledge at the time of purchase.
